hero.title: Our Photography Services
hero.description: Professional photography services tailored to capture your most precious moments. From weddings to commercial projects, we deliver exceptional quality and unforgettable experiences.

weddings.title: Wedding Photography
weddings.description: Capture every magical moment of your special day with our professional wedding photography services. We document your love story with artistry and emotion.
features: Full day coverage with multiple photographers
Custom wedding album design and printing
Drone photography for stunning aerial shots

portraits.title: Portrait Photography
portraits.description: Professional portrait sessions that capture your personality and natural beauty. Perfect for individuals, families, professionals, and special occasions.
features: Indoor studio or outdoor location shoots

events.title: Event Photography
events.description: Comprehensive event coverage that preserves every important moment. From corporate events to private celebrations, we capture the essence of your occasion.
features: Same-day photo delivery for urgent needs

commercial.title: Commercial Photography
commercial.description: High-quality commercial photography to elevate your brand and products. Professional images that drive engagement and increase sales.

process.title: How It Works
process.description: Simple, transparent process from first contact to final delivery

step1.title: Contact Us
step1.description: Reach out via WhatsApp or phone to discuss your photography needs and vision

step2.title: Plan Together
step2.description: We'll create a customized plan, timeline, and discuss all the details of your session

step3.title: Photo Session
step3.description: Professional photography session at your chosen location with expert guidance

step4.title: Receive Photos
step4.description: Get your beautifully edited high-resolution photos delivered digitally

professional.title: Professional Quality
professional.description: High-end equipment and expert techniques ensure stunning results

flexible.title: Flexible Packages
flexible.description: Customized services tailored to your specific needs and budget

timely.title: Timely Delivery
timely.description: Fast turnaround times without compromising on quality

satisfaction.title: 100% Satisfaction
satisfaction.description: We're not happy until you're absolutely thrilled with your photos

location.title: Service Areas
location.description: We provide photography services throughout the region and are available for destination projects.
areas: All major cities and surrounding areas

availability.title: Availability
availability.description: We're here when you need us. Contact us to check availability for your date.

cta.title: Ready to Book Your Session?
cta.description: Contact us today for a custom quote and let's create something beautiful together.

whatsapp.generalMessage: Hi! I'm interested in your photography services. Can you provide more details and pricing?
